title: TouchReport
description: Reusable leaf touch-report metadata. Leaves emit concrete touched surfaces so parent loops can compare runtime evidence against sibling ownership surfaces and dependencies.
$comment: This is a reusable sub-schema, not a top-level envelope artifact. ExecutionRecord and related payloads can $ref this schema for touched-surface evidence.

task_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable task id for the leaf that produced this report.

report_type.description: REQUIRED string. Discriminator for touch-report payloads.

touched_files.description: REQUIRED array. Concrete repo-relative files or glob-scoped file surfaces touched by the leaf.

items.description: Repo-relative file path or glob pattern. Absolute paths, parent-directory traversal, and whitespace are not valid surface identifiers.

touched_interfaces.description: REQUIRED array. Concrete interface, route, command, or API-contract surfaces touched by the leaf. Use HTTP route signatures such as PUT /api/example or symbolic interface:<name> identifiers.

items.description: HTTP route signature or symbolic interface surface identifier.

touched_data.description: REQUIRED array. Concrete data-store, config, or logical data-resource surfaces touched by the leaf. Use prefixed identifiers such as table:<name> or config:<key>.

items.description: Prefixed data resource identifier. The prefix names the resource kind used for conflict matching.

touched_workflow_steps.description: REQUIRED array. Concrete workflow steps touched by the leaf. Use workflow:<step> for cross-artifact references or a domain-scoped step such as admin-settings:save.

items.description: Workflow step identifier. workflow:<step> is canonical for dependency references; domain-scoped steps such as admin-settings:save are accepted for touched workflow steps.
